statement.markdown: You are given the head of a LinkedList and an index. The task is to return the node at the given index. If the index is out of bounds, return null.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be a LinkedList node and an integer index.
statement.outputFormat: Return the node at the given index or null if the index is out of bounds.
statement.notes: You must use a LinkedList iterator to solve this problem. You are not allowed to use an index or pointer directly.

functionSignature.java: public boolean isValid(int index, LinkedListNode head);
